---
title: ""
listing:
  contents: posts
  page-size: 120
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  fields: [date, title, reading-time, description, categories, image, author]
  feed: true
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
---

<!-- :::: {.columns} -->

<!-- ::: {.column width="40%"} -->
<!-- # Series -->

<!-- #### [TextAnalytics-series](ggplot-series.html) -->
<!-- This series contains a great deal of tips, tricks and packages that you can use to level up your text analysis and categorical data visualization  -->
<!-- ::: -->

<!-- ::: {.column width="60%"} -->

<!-- # Subscribe -->
<!-- <iframe id="beehiiv-form" src="https://embeds.beehiiv.com/9232d2a2-6e85-4beb-b8ed-1de94e9e4f01?slim=true" data-test-id="beehiiv-embed" frameborder="0" scrolling="no" style="margin: 0; border-radius: 0px !important; background-color: transparent; height: 75px; width: 90%;"></iframe> -->

<!-- ::: -->


<!-- :::: -->
